caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" and a black baseball cap featuring a metallic emblem. He wears over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. To his left and right, graphic overlays appear on the screen: one featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another simply saying "BOSS TALK 101". In the background, a white wall is decorated with gold stars and the word "HUSTLE" repeated vertically. A screen behind him partially displays the words "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a consistent seated position, glancing slightly to his right with a subtle smile. The scene is static, with very little movement as the man maintains his expression and posture across the sequence.
